title: Bombay High Court pulls up lawyer who appeared for multiple parties without vakalatnama
description: The Nagpur Bench of the Bombay High Court recently pulled up a lawyer for misleading the court and referred him to the Bar Council of Maharashtra and Goa for alleged professional misconduct [Pushpa Sanjay Gupta v. State of Maharashtra and Ors]The Court was hearing a plea concerning the removal of unauthorised constructions on land in the city. It recorded that the private parties whom the lawyer was purportedly representing sought to justify their possession by relying on a civil court decree.&n
